title: centaurea × sub-sadleriana
intro: Centaurea × sub-sadleriana, a hybrid perennial plant, is a member of the sunflower family and is also known as the Centaurea montana. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea × sub-sadleriana include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as supporting the immune system and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × sub-sadleriana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin conditions to respiratory issues.
